name: Yorick

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Shepherd of Souls
passive.description_source: Innate- Final Service: Enemies that die near  Yorick will leave a grave, as well as those he kills or damages with  Last Rites. Yorick can use  Awakening and  Mourning Mist to turn all graves into Mist Walkers that assist him in combat.

effects.description: Innate - Final Service: Whenever Yorick uses Last Rites to score the killing blow on any enemy or damage an enemy champion or large monster, he raises a grave at their location. Additionally, a grave is passively raised for every 8th : 2nd (based on level) enemy that dies otherwise near him. Up to 4 graves can exist at once, lasting until Yorick exits the general area or dies, with the furthest one always being replaced by the newest upon raising one over the limit.
Yorick can use Awakening and Mourning Mist's mark to raise 1 Mist Walker from each grave after a 1-second delay, consuming the graves in the process.
Innate - The Cursed Horde: Up to 4 Mist Walkers can be active at once near Yorick or near The Maiden, with the nearest one always being replaced by the newest upon raising one over the limit.
See Pets for more details about Mist Walkers.

passive.description: Innate - Final Service: Whenever Yorick uses Last Rites to score the killing blow on any enemy or damage an enemy champion or large monster, he raises a grave at their location. Additionally, a grave is passively raised for every 8th : 2nd (based on level) enemy that dies otherwise near him. Up to 4 graves can exist at once, lasting until Yorick exits the general area or dies, with the furthest one always being replaced by the newest upon raising one over the limit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Damaging a large monster or champion with Last Rites will only spawn 1 grave, even if it kills them.

basic_ability_1.name: Last Rites
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Yorick's next basic attack within a few seconds will gain  bonus range, deal bonus physical damage, and  heal him based on his missing health.

effects.context_notes: Active: Yorick empowers his next basic attack within 5 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 50 bonus range, deal bonus physical damage, and heal him.
Active: Yorick empowers his next basic attack within 5 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 50 bonus range, deal bonus physical damage, and heal him.
Active: Yorick empowers his next basic attack within 5 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 50 bonus range, deal bonus physical damage, and heal him.

effects.description: While there are at least 3 graves nearby and Last Rites is active or on cooldown, Yorick can cast Awakening.
Last Rites resets Yorick's basic attack timer.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Yorick empowers his next basic attack within 5 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 50 bonus range, deal bonus physical damage, and heal him. The heal is reduced by 50% against non-champions.
context_notes: Manual review (2026-02-24): Last Rites is cast-gated and attack-cadence-coupled with attack-reset behavior; damage/heal resolve on empowered-hit contact rather than instant cast.
Manual review (2026-02-24): The empowered hit's heal branch remains champion-vs-non-champion scoped, and kill-confirm behavior ties into grave generation/Awakening flow.

basic_ability_2.name: Dark Procession
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Yorick summons a destructible ring of spirits at the target location that  knocks aside enemies hit. It remains as terrain against enemies for a few seconds.

effects.description: Active: Yorick summons a ring of spirits around the target location that arises after a 0.75-second delay, knocking aside enemies hit by the walls over 0.25 seconds, though not through terrain. Within 210-units, they are pulled inside; otherwise they are pushed away. The ring remains for 4 seconds as impassible terrain against enemies, granting sight inside the ring.

effects.context_notes: Dark Procession can only be targeted by enemy champion basic attacks and turrets.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Yorick summons a ring of spirits around the target location that arises after a 0.75-second delay, knocking aside enemies hit by the walls over 0.25 seconds, though not through terrain. Within 210-units, they are pulled inside; otherwise they are pushed away. The ring remains for 4 seconds as impassible terrain against enemies, granting sight inside the ring.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Dark Procession has a turret prioritization value of 6, equal to that of super minions.

basic_ability_3.name: Mourning Mist
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Yorick hurls a globule of Black Mist that splashes at the target location dealing magic damage to enemies. Enemy  champions and  monsters hit are also shortly  slowed, and marked Cursed for a few seconds.

effects.context_notes: Active: Yorick hurls a globule of Black Mist that splashes across an area at the target location, dealing magic damage to enemies hit, down to a minimum threshold against minions, and capped against monsters.

Active: Yorick hurls a globule of Black Mist that splashes across an area at the target location, dealing magic damage to enemies hit, down to a minimum threshold against minions, and capped against monsters.

Active: Yorick hurls a globule of Black Mist that splashes across an area at the target location, dealing magic damage to enemies hit, down to a minimum threshold against minions, and capped against monsters.
Cursed: The target is revealed and inflicted with armor reduction, and continually raises a Mist Walker from each nearby grave, up to a maximum of 4.
Cursed: The target is revealed and inflicted with armor reduction, and continually raises a Mist Walker from each nearby grave, up to a maximum of 4.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Yorick hurls a globule of Black Mist that splashes across an area at the target location, dealing magic damage to enemies hit, down to a minimum threshold against minions, and capped against monsters. Enemy champions and monsters hit are slowed by 30% for 1.5 seconds and marked as Cursed for 4 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Yorick will snap his facing direction towards the target location at the start of the cast time.

ultimate.name: Eulogy of the Isles
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Yorick summons the  Maiden of the Mist and a few Mist Walkers at the target location. The Maiden will automatically raise Mist Walkers from dead enemies, and mark her attack target with Touch of the Maiden.

effects.context_notes: Active: Yorick summons the Maiden of the Mist over 1.5 seconds, along with a number of Mist Walkers surrounding her at the target location, which remain on the battlefield until she or Yorick dies. Eulogy of the Isles can be recast once while the Maiden is alive after 10 seconds of the activation.

effects.description: Recast: Yorick sets the Maiden free, allowing her to push the nearest lane until she dies.
See Pets for more details about The Maiden of the Mist.

ultimate.description: Active: Yorick summons the Maiden of the Mist over 1.5 seconds, along with a number of Mist Walkers surrounding her at the target location, which remain on the battlefield until she or Yorick dies. Eulogy of the Isles can be recast once while the Maiden is alive after 10 seconds of the activation.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): See the Pets section below for more details about The Maiden of the Mist and Mist Walkers.

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
